desc: Fix three reorientation problems: post-completion dead end, validation error opacity, API schema invariant gap

init.desc: Synthetic init — roots all independent tasks

orient-forward-pointer.desc: When orient returns complete:true, scan for unloaded specs (.roadmap/*-spec.json not yet in head.json) and surface them as pendingSpecs[] with path and dag_id

validate.statement: Plan clarity: orient forward pointer is unambiguous — scan .roadmap/*-spec.json, compare to head.json dag id, return unloaded specs

make-full-contract-errors.desc: Collect ALL validation failures (define, verify, check, terminal-intent, init-intent) before throwing — emit them as errors[] array with node, message, fix for each

validate.statement: Plan clarity: make validation is unambiguous — collect all errors, return array, never throw on first

api-invariants.desc: Extend api make output with an 'invariants' section documenting: terminal-intent-gate (term needs intent+expandOnFail), init-boundary-gate (init-adjacent needs intent+expandOnFail+plan/clarity keyword), input-verification requirements

validate.statement: Plan clarity: api invariants are unambiguous — machine-readable invariant descriptions for every make validation rule

orient-wire-cli.desc: Wire orient-forward into cmdOrient — when complete:true, include pendingSpecs and nextAction hint in output

make-wire-errors.desc: Wire make-validation into cmdMake — replace sequential throws with collected errors[] in error payload

api-wire-invariants.desc: Wire api-invariants into cmdApi — include invariants in api make output

integration-verified.desc: All three fixes work end-to-end: orient surfaces pending specs on complete DAG, make returns full error array, api make includes invariants

validate.statement: All three reorientation problems are resolved — agents can self-orient after DAG completion, understand full make contract on first error, and read invariants from api
